case_title: EMILE CHAPOT VS. ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,742.50 FILED BY CHAPOT, EMILE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC. DBA ROYAL AUTO GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY CHAPOT, EMILE ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC. DBA ROYAL AUTO GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-19-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EMILE CHAPOT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAVE TORKELSEN (OPERATIONS DIRECTOR) WITH WITNESS RAYMOND AHNER IS ALSO PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $485.00 TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK AND MAILED OUT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DECEMBER 19, 2022, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SHERIFF'S SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED AUG-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC. DBA ROYAL AUTO GROUP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVE TORKLSEN, OPERATIONS DIRECTOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC. DBA ROYAL AUTO GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-22-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PURSUANT TO JUDGE PRO TEM RECUSAL C.C.P. 170.1. PLAINTIFF EMILE CHAPOT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDERSON ENTERPRISES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAVE TORKELSEN (OPERATIONS DIRECTOR) WITH WITNESS RAYMOND AHNER IS ALSO PRESENT. MATTER IS CONTINUED AND SCHEDULED ON A DATE HONORABLE JUDGE MICHELLE TONG WILL BE AVAILABLE TO HEAR THE CASE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) PURSUANT TO JUDGE PRO TEM RECUSAL.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
